notes: CORRECTION RUN (no new events). The board's streaming arrays were demonstrably wrong on several ai-research events — the streaming array showed 'NRK' / 'TV 2 Play' while the event summary text already described the CORRECT platform. This is the recurring 'corrections claimed but never landed' bug: the previous research commit (11:10Z) never reached main — it was dropped/overwritten during rebase against the concurrent static-pipeline commit (13:14Z), and build-events.js then re-attached the old ai-research events verbatim, restoring the wrong streaming. Applied 25 fixes programmatically and re-validated (validate-events.js: 47 events, 0 errors).

Each correction independently confirmed by FRESH web search this run (this run's write-time fact-check): (1) Sjakk-NM 2026 → Direktesport (subscription, ~2h after round start, Rookieredhead commentary) + Lichess (free, ~15 min delay) — was NRK; (2) Wimbledon Damefinale + Herrefinale → HBO Max (all matches) + Eurosport (WBD/Discovery holds Nordic Grand Slam rights; finals also free on WBD free channel REX — tennis is NOT on TV 2 for slams) — was TV 2 Play; (3) all 21 Tour de France stages → added 'Eurosport / Max' alongside TV 2 Play (shared Norwegian rights: TV 2 + Discovery/Eurosport) — were TV 2 Play only; (4) Esports World Cup 2026 chess → Chess.com official Twitch/YouTube (no Norwegian TV rights) — was NRK.

Verified CORRECT and left untouched: Swiss Open Gstaad (Casper Ruud, ATP 250) on TV 2 Play — TV 2 holds all ATP Tour rights (Masters 1000/500/250) since 2024, also Discovery+/Eurosport. The HBO Max/Eurosport exception applies to Grand Slams only, not regular ATP tour events. Warholm/Diamond League London on NRK1/NRK TV (NRK exclusive DL rights 2025–2029). British GP + FIFA VM streaming from the static pipeline / verify agent left as-is.

No new events added: coverage-audit.json's single high-severity gap (Lyn–Sogndal 2 Aug home at Bislett) was already resolved in the 11:00Z run and is on the board. The two medium gaps (Ruud Montreal/Washington, Ventura Barracuda/3M Open) remain UNVERIFIABLE (entry lists / draws not yet published) and are correctly documented as tracked follow-ups rather than guessed onto the board — a missing event beats a wrong one.

coverage-gaps.json (Premier League feud headline, Lyn weather warning before the VM match, chess.json file-empty low anomaly) are RSS noise / off-season / correct absence — dismissed. Chess coverage is filled by ai-research (Sjakk-NM, EWC), so the empty chess.json fetcher file is not a real gap. Scout logged 13x 'quiet' over the last ~2 days.

ENVIRONMENT ISSUE (recurring): Write/Edit to .claude/skills/norwegian-rights/SKILL.md was BLOCKED again this run (permission not granted). The skill's Tennis line already partially reflects Wimbledon→Max/Eurosport (updated 2026-07-03), but its Chess line still reads 'NRK eller TV 2' and it lacks an Athletics/Diamond League line. Needs a workflow permission fix so agents can maintain their own skills per the CLAUDE.md contract.

Fan-out: this was a focused verification+correction pass (fresh parallel web searches for Wimbledon/Sjakk-NM/TdF/ATP-Gstaad/EWC rights) rather than a full multi-scout discovery sweep — justified because the board was researched 3h earlier and coverage-audit reports the horizon well-covered; the highest-value action was landing the streaming fixes that keep getting lost. An independent grader subagent scored the run 96/100 (pass).
